# Marketing & Sales Software

> Curated directory of marketing, growth and sales-communication software for revenue teams, drawn from the same vetted database. Last updated 2026-06-15.

Reviews are written by Daan: a Dutch former banker (23 years in international finance) who now runs his businesses from Saigon, Vietnam, using the tools he reviews — including a 24/7 crypto trading bot built with Replit's AI agent on Bitvavo's API, and an autonomous AI agent (Victor) that maintains his sites in 35 languages from a Hostinger VPS. Hands-on reviews reflect real, personal use.

## Directory
- [All marketing & sales tools](https://marketingandsalessoftware.com/): the full themed directory
## Best-of guides
- [Best CRM software 2026](https://aibuildermarketplace.com/best/crm-software/): Keap, folk, Close compared
- [Best social media tools 2026](https://aibuildermarketplace.com/best/social-media-tools/): Later, Vista Social, Shorby and more
## Deeper reviews
- [AIBuilder Marketplace reviews](https://aibuildermarketplace.com/b2b/): in-depth reviews and comparisons for these tools
